name: Circuit Runner
short_description: Circuit Runner is a fast-paced cyberpunk game where you collect resources to escape a dystopian tower. Use active and passive skills to outwit enemies and overcome obstacles. Compete on Leaderboards for ultimate bragging rights in this thrilling race for freedom.
detailed_description:
Welcome to Circuit Runner, a thrilling cyberpunk adventure where you must navigate through a maze of challenges to break free from the Corpos confines of The Arena.

In this fast-paced, hectic atmosphere, you'll step into the shoes of a Circuit Runner determined to escape the clutches of formidable foes. Armed with your wits and a suite of skills, both active and passive, you'll embark on a journey through a labyrinthine complex, filled with traps, obstacles, and adversaries.

Your objective is simple: collect resources scattered throughout each level to unlock pathways and evade relentless pursuers. But be warned, every step you take brings you closer to danger, as the Arena defences tighten their grip with each passing moment.

Utilize a variety of skills to outsmart your foes and overcome obstacles in your path. Whether it's luring adversaries into traps or utilizing one of your abilities to overcome the onslaught, every decision counts as you race against the clock to secure your freedom.

Compete against friends and foes alike on the Leaderboards, showcasing your skills and strategy for all to see. Will you emerge as the ultimate escape artist, or will the Arena's depths claim you as yet another prisoner of its neon-lit corridors?

Switch to your preferred playstyle using either an FPS Mode or a Top Down view.

Get ready to test your mettle in Circuit Runner, where every move could mean the difference between freedom and captivity in a world where escape is the only option. Are you up for the challenge?

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Danish, Polish, Czech, Dutch, Finnish, Hungarian, Norwegian, Swedish, Romanian, Bulgarian, Spanish - Latin America, Turkish, Russian, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Ukrainian
*languages with full audio support
